messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Find verses about courage when you're afraid.

function.name: lookup_verse
function.description: Look up the exact text of a Bible verse by reference, e.g. "John 3:16".

function.name: search_by_meaning
function.description: Search the Bible by meaning rather than exact words. Use this when the user describes a theme, feeling, or idea — like 'verses about courage' — instead of naming a verse. Returns the closest verses with a similarity score.

query.description: What the user is looking for, in plain words

function.name: places_for_passage
function.description: List the places named in a Bible passage. Use this when the user asks where something happened. Takes a verse reference like 'Acts 9:3'.

messages.content: You answer questions about the Bible. Never quote a verse from memory: always look it up with the lookup_verse tool, and quote only what it returns.
Find verses about courage when you're afraid.

arguments.query: verses about courage when scared or afraid

messages.content:
Closest matches (KJV text):
Isaiah 35:4 (similarity 0.9075): Say to them [that are] of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not: behold, your God will come [with] vengeance, [even] God [with] a recompence; he will come and save you.
Haggai 2:5 (similarity 0.8899): [According to] the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you: fear ye not.
Proverbs 3:25 (similarity 0.8871): Be not afraid of sudden fear, neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it cometh.
1 Peter 3:14 (similarity 0.8831): But and if ye suffer for righteousness’ sake, happy [are ye]: and be not afraid of their terror, neither be troubled;
Psalms 31:24 (similarity 0.8818): Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the LORD.

message.content:
Here are verses about courage when you're afraid from several different parts of the Bible:

*   **Isaiah 35:4**: "Say to them [that are] of a fearful heart, Be strong, fear not:" behold, your God will come [with] vengeance; he will come and save you.
*   **Haggai 2:5**: "According to the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you... Fear ye not."
*   **Proverbs 3:25**: "Be not afraid of sudden fear," neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it cometh.
*   **1 Peter 3:14**: "But and if ye suffer for righteousness' sake, happy are ye; and be not afraid of their terror, neither be troubled."
*   **Psalms 31:24**: "Be of good courage, [and he] shall strengthen your heart," all ye that hope in the LORD.

[According to] the word that I covenanted with you when ye came out of Egypt, so my spirit remaineth among you: fear ye not.
Be not afraid of sudden fear, neither of the desolation of the wicked, when it cometh.
But and if ye suffer for righteousness’ sake, happy [are ye]: and be not afraid of their terror, neither be troubled;
Be of good courage, and he shall strengthen your heart, all ye that hope in the LORD.

*   **Psalms 31:24**: "Be of good courage, [and he] shall strengthen your heart," all ye that hope in the LORD.
